summary: Herion Iteration 12 Testing Complete - Document Intelligence Layer & Italy-Only Cleanup. 20/20 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified.

minor.issue: Route ordering issue - parameterized route /documents/{document_id} was catching these requests. FIXED by moving static routes before parameterized route.

seed_data_creation: Nexus S.r.l. practice (ID: e18f8d72-ea8f-445b-951a-bbd082e60648) seeded from COMPANY_CLOSURE template
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested Phase A (Italy-only cleanup) and Phase B (Document Intelligence Layer). All 20 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Document Matrix panel shows 6 required docs, 1 conditional (delegation with P7M), 4 expected outputs for COMPANY_CLOSURE. Guard panel integrates with document_completeness dimension. Catalog shows Italy scope badge and operational_status per card. Registry has no 'multi' country entries. Creator password is PROTECTED in test_credentials.md.

catalog_operational_status.details: All entries have operational_status (active_italy_scope or active_internal)

registry_status.details: All registry entries have registry_status field

registry_no_multi.details: No registry entries have country='multi' - all are IT

features: COMPANY_CLOSURE has 6 required docs, 1 conditional (delegation), 4 outputs

document_matrix_types_api.details: Returns all 10 practice types with matrix metadata

sensitivity_levels_api.details: Returns 5 sensitivity levels (standard, personal, fiscal, legal, confidential) with visibility rules

signature_handling.details: 2 required docs need signatures (bilancio_finale_liquidazione, verbale_approvazione), conditional delegation accepts P7M format

guard_document_integration.details: Guard evaluation includes document_completeness dimension using Document Matrix

catalog_operational_status_badges.details: Cards show operational status badges (e.g., 'Attivo Italia')

practice_detail_document_matrix_panel.details: Shows 6 required docs, 4 expected outputs, 1 conditional doc, completeness status

practice_detail_guard_panel.details: Shows verdict (Bloccato), score (14%), dimensions, safe alternatives

creator_password_protection.details: test_credentials.md shows PROTECTED, not actual password

bug_fix_applied.issue: Route ordering conflict - /documents/{document_id} was catching /documents/matrix-types and /documents/sensitivity-levels
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved static routes before parameterized route in server.py
